title: Angel Bag - The Perfect Back to School Bag
description:
Heading back to school? 🎓

Meet the Angel Leather Bag – your new go-to everyday bag. Spacious enough for your laptop, notebooks, and daily essentials, with multiple pockets to keep you perfectly organized.

A chic, practical design made to match every outfit. Start the year strong with a bag that does it all 🤍

title: Angel Bag – The Perfect Everyday Bag
description:
Meet the Angel Bag – your new go-to for everyday elegance.

Crafted from high-quality vegan leather, it’s spacious enough to fit your laptop, essentials, and even your full makeup kit – all while staying sleek and lightweight.

Whether you’re heading to work, a café, or a weekend trip, this timeless shoulder bag adds effortless style to every outfit.

Loved for its premium feel, smart compartments, and versatile design.

Now back in stock – but not for long.

The must-have bag is very roomy, and can even fit a Macbook 13" inside.

title: Die eine und einzige Bogota Bag
description:
Deine neue Go-To-Tasche für jeden Tag.
Unsere Must-Have-Schultertasche hat eine runde Form und ein geflochtenes Design. Sie verfügt über ein großes Hauptfach mit Reißverschluss, zwei kleinere Innenfächer mit Reißverschluss sowie eine kleine offene Innentasche.
Diese Tasche ist super geräumig – ein 13-Zoll-Macbook passt problemlos hinein.

title: L’unique et iconique Bogota Bag
description:
Votre nouveau sac incontournable du quotidien.
Notre sac bandoulière “must-have” arbore une forme arrondie et un design tressé élégant. Il dispose d’un grand compartiment principal avec fermeture zippée, de deux poches intérieures zippées supplémentaires et d’une petite poche ouverte.
Ce sac ultra-pratique est aussi spacieux que stylé — il peut même contenir un Macbook 13”.

title: La sola e unica Bogota Bag
description:
La tua nuova borsa quotidiana indispensabile.
La nostra borsa a spalla must-have ha una forma arrotondata e un design intrecciato. All’interno, un ampio scomparto principale con chiusura a zip, due tasche interne con zip e una piccola tasca aperta.
Una borsa spaziosa ed elegante – può persino contenere un MacBook da 13”.

title: La única e inigualable Bogota Bag
description:
Tu nuevo bolso ideal para el día a día.
Nuestro bolso al hombro imprescindible tiene una forma redondeada y un diseño trenzado. Cuenta con un amplio compartimento principal con cierre de cremallera, dos bolsillos interiores con cremallera y uno pequeño abierto.
Es un bolso muy espacioso — incluso cabe un MacBook de 13”.

title: The Napoli Bag + 1 free pouch
description:
The Spacious Bag for the Active Woman

The Napoli Bag is designed for the modern, active woman who needs both style and functionality in her everyday life. This large, versatile bag offers ample space for all your essentials, making it perfect for busy days, whether you're heading to work, the gym, or running errands.

With its sleek design and durable construction, the Napoli Bag blends practicality with elegance, ensuring you stay organized and stylish no matter where the day takes you. Embrace the perfect balance of fashion and function with this must-have accessory for active women on the go!
